name: Vegetarian Lentil Paella
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, cook the green pepper, yellow pepper, celery, onion (both red and white), and garlic in hot oil until the onions are tender but not brown.
2. Rinse the lentils under cold water.
3. Add the rinsed lentils, vegetable broth, and turmeric to the pan with the cooked vegetables. Stir well.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low and cover the pot. Simmer for 20 to 30 minutes or until the lentils are tender and most of the liquid has been absorbed.
6. Stir in the chopped tomatoes, thawed peas, stuffed olives, ripe olives, and cilantro. Mix until heated through.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste before serving.
- 306 Calories
- 16g protein
- 46g carbohydrates
- 10g fat (1g saturated)
- 0mg cholesterol
- 1034mg sodium
- 913mg potassium
